hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs -I {} bun biome check --write {} 2>/dev/null || true
if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^git commit|&& git commit|; git commit'; then bun tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; else exit 0; fi
if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^git commit|&& git commit|; git commit'; then bun run build 2>&1 | tail -5; else exit 0; fi
